label: Quality
summary: Baseline code-quality rules for reliability and clarity.

rules.label: Async Lock Held Across Await
rules.description: Async lock scopes or explicit acquire/release regions that continue across unrelated await points.
rules.explanation: In Python, Async Lock Held Across Await matters because the pattern here, Async lock scopes or explicit acquire/release regions that continue across unrelated await points, creates lifecycle behavior that is easy to miss until the system is under load or shutting down.
rules.fix: For Async Lock Held Across Await in Python, give the work an explicit owner, pass the right context or handle, and make cancellation or shutdown visible in the API.

rules.label: Async Retry Sleep without Backoff

rules.fix: For Async Retry Sleep without Backoff in Python, add visible backoff, jitter, or bounded retry policy or move the code to a path where that safeguard is guaranteed before the risky work happens.
